accounts.name: cranker
docs: Permissionless: anyone may crank a recorded ruling. The cranker only
pays rent for the dispute-vouch-link accounts.

errors.name: StakeOverflow
errors.msg: Stake amount overflowed the existing vouch

errors.name: VouchAccountMismatch
errors.msg: Vouch account does not match the expected voucher/vouchee pair

errors.name: VouchNotReusable
errors.msg: This vouch relationship cannot accept new stake in its current state

errors.name: InvalidUsdcMint
errors.msg: USDC mint does not match config

errors.name: InvalidTokenMint
errors.msg: Token account mint does not match config

errors.name: AuthorRewardVaultMismatch
errors.msg: Author reward vault does not match author profile

fields.name: slashed_deposit_usdc_micros
docs: Voucher stake slashed into the author proceeds vault by an upheld
excluded from the challenger reward base.

fields.name: locked_by_dispute
docs: Mirror of the current settlement's dispute lock, kept at the listing
level so it survives settlement rotation: while set, vouch positions
cannot be linked/unlinked, the revision cannot be bumped, and no new
settlement can be initialized for this listing.
